extracted_json.title: Quick summary of L#1

items.text: Fast cycle competitors - FAANG & MANGA - can balance the conflicting trade-offs between product quality, speed, & cost; and can successfully manage risk.
This course will develop the building blocks, & a framework - MDC - for integrating these blocks
Professionals (Engineering, Business, ....) generally use a 5-step structured problem-solving process (SPSP):

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Lecture 1 recap: fast-cycle competitors, MDC framework, and the 5-step SPSP.
extracted_json.summary_gist: A recap of Lecture 1: fast-cycle competitors (FAANG & MANGA) balance trade-offs among product quality, speed, and cost while managing risk. The course develops building blocks and an integrating framework (MDC). It introduces the 5-step structured problem-solving process (SPSP): Define → Plan → Execute → Checking → Learn/Generalize.

transcription:
1.   Quick  summary  of  L # 1
        - Fast  cycle  competitors - FAANG & MANGA -
        can  balance  the  conflicting  trade-offs
        between product quality, speed, & cost ;
        and  can  successfully manage  risk.
        -  This  course  will  develop the building blocks,
           & a  framework - MDC - for integrating
           these  blocks
        -  Professionals (Engineering, Business, ....)
           generally  use  a  5-step  structured
           problem-solving process (SPSP):

      Define ⟶ Plan (or Process or Approach) ⟶ Execute ⌐
                  Learn/Generalize ⟵ Checking ⟵
